items.name: 'Hammer 5' Canis Helmet Mold A
items.description: Developed by Olcom, the Canis line of helmets were designed as part of their 'contractor special' line and personally overseen by Keystone, Olcoms' default to private security. Designs such as this were employed by Keystones' Hammer Company, who are known for their brutal methods of enforcing corporate law.

items.name: chain
items.description:
This awesome and classic iced out diamond chain necklace has a subtle glowing effect in bright light environments . It's great for the coolest outfits that want awesome luxury sparkly diamonds look along with a magic glow crystal . Whether you're dressing emo / scene / goth / punk / Y2K / retro or any style -- wear this epic necklace . The amulet / gem part of this necklace has a summer ombre effect .
